feed.title: AO3 - Damian Wayne/Reader (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Damian Wayne/Reader on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Irreversibility of Endless Summer
entry.summary:
Author: Linalima

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 320,103Chapters: 18/40Kudos: 114

Summary: She and the Wayne boy spoke for the first time during a literature lesson the following school year. He approached her desk and, in an even tone devoid of intonation, stated: “You’re in my seat.”Lane raised her eyes to him impassively and, without blinking, replied: “Then find another one.”A look of genuine astonishment flitted across his face — so comical that, had she had a bit more strength for bickering, she would certainly have laughed. But instead, Lane merely made peace by pulling her bag off the neighboring chair — as if to say, sit down, if you must. And he sat.Or.The story of Lane Winters and Damian Wayne over the course of ten years.

entry.title: Three Months to Surrender
entry.summary:
Author: Miss_nightshade

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 52,612Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 178

Summary: Summoned home by the League’s command, Damian is thrust into an arranged marriage that threatens everything he’s built far from their shadows. Caught between loyalty, love, and a destiny he never wanted, Damian finds himself walking a knife’s edge, where every secret costs more than the last.

entry.title: People Aren't Good
entry.summary:
Author: Miss_nightshade

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 49,107Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 127

Summary: Hecate has spent her life tucked into the bruised edges of Gotham’s Narrows, pretending to be a small, harmless girl with nothing worth noticing. It’s a fragile lie, but it holds. She goes to school. She walks home alone. She returns to a house that feels older than she is, a place that hums with magic she refuses to touch. She keeps her power buried. She ignores the ancient voices whispering inside her. She does everything she can to stay unseen. And for years, it works. Until the night it doesn’t.

entry.summary:
Author: youngirlfrom

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,841Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 14

Summary: While on a secret mission at some gala, a handsome fella asks you to dance. Damian watches you from the corner. Will he do something about it, or will he let jealousy consume him?

entry.title: Distractions
entry.summary:
Author: h0ttiewithab0dy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,452Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 118

Summary: Damian Wayne does not have any friends. They’re a waste of time and a distraction from his work as Robin. But when Alfred insists that having a friend could be potentially beneficial, he caves. And the girl he chooses to tolerate ends up breaking through all his walls and into his heart.

entry.title: Hope
entry.summary:
Author: coldghost89

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,853Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 65

Summary: Moving around place to place is all you've ever known. Never staying in one place too long, you live a decent life with your older sister.After moving to Gotham in hopes for a new beginning, your past begins to unravel, exposing ugly truths and painful memories.But with you as you walk through this new life, is hope. Hope for the end of the bad and the beginning of the good.

entry.title: Last Bullet, Last Breath
entry.summary:
Author: Kmslli

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,709Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 10

Summary: Gotham is dangerous, corrupt, and survival here is a brutal challenge. No one knows this better than those from Gotham's forgotten corners. To survive, you either have to be filthy rich or a master of the art of survival. But there is a place even more dangerous than Gotham, a place where living is nearly impossible: Zaun. A place where Gotham citizens would never dare to set foot.

entry.title: Attempted First Degree Murder
entry.summary:
Author: idk_butimhere

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,298Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 30

Summary: “Aw- don’t give me that look! It was your fault!” “No it wasn’t- I’m not that ignorant to my surroundings that I’d willingly consume paint water- it contains chemicals in it that might affect my digestive tract!-” “Don’t lie- it happens to everyone.” “It was not my fault-” He pointed an accusing finger at you, perfectly replicating that Ace Attorney game he was obsessed with. “You were distracting me.” A slow grin spread across your face. “I was distracting you, hm?”   OR Damian struggles with an art assignment and you bully him <3

entry.title: You seem pretty in love for a girl who's just faking it.
entry.summary:
Author: IYLDWM

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,820Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 12

Summary: Meeting Damian Wayne was fate. It was constructed by some higher power completely out of your control. Becoming his fake girlfriend? Not so much. That was man made and a horrible awful idea.

entry.title: Are you lonesome like me?
entry.summary:
Author: IYLDWM

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,377Chapters: 8/9Kudos: 51

Summary: "You shouldn't be here." The words hurt more than it should've, especially since there was three full years of silence between the two of you. "I go here now" you replied taken aback, you'd be lying if you hadn't wondered about when you'd eventually run into him.Sure Gotham was a large city and Gotham U had hundreds of students but Gotham had a way of pulling things back together, in a sick and twisted way.--Damian Wayne and reader were teenage sweethearts before a cruel breakup causing them to part three year later and fate has brought them back together, why?
